title: Enquiries about the National Citizen Service (NCS)
body: " The NCS Trust website is no longer operational and social media is no longer monitored. These will shortly be closed down.  For guidance on spotting and reporting scam websites, please visit the National Cyber Security Centre site.  Please direct any general enquiries or whistleblowing to enquiries@dcms.gov.uk .  Please direct any freedom of information requests to foi@dcms.gov.uk and data retention or deletion requests and subject access requests to dpo@dcms.gov.uk.  For any legal matters, the address for formal service of legal documents is:   Department for Culture, Media and Sport100 Parliament StreetLondon SW1A 2BQUnited Kingdom  "
